##NAMES=Raygrantite
##RRUFFID=R120151
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Pb_10_Zn(SO_4_)_6_(SiO_4_)_2_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Evening Star mine, Tiger Wash, Belmont Mountain, Tonopah, Big Horn Mts, Maricopa County, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ron Gibbs and Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless bladed crystals associated with anglesite and galena, type sample. The crystals show fish-tail twin habit. Type sample.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120151
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Pb_9.81_Zn_0.93_(S_1.00_O_4_)_6_(Si_1.05_O_4_)_2_(OH)_2_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.3175 b: 11.1973 c: 10.8318 alpha: 120.374 beta: 90.511 gamma: 56.471 volume: 753.13 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
